metadata.description: Backend engineer building and operating production systems. Currently building Ultimate Frisbee Tracker, a real-time tournament platform serving ~1,700 users.

home.name: Juan Murillo
home.subtitle: Creator of Ultimate Frisbee Tracker — a real SaaS platform powering live tournaments.
home.focus: Currently specializing in Backend Engineering, distributed systems, and software architecture.

whyMatters.title: Why UFT Matters
whyMatters.body: UFT started as a tool to solve real problems at Ultimate Frisbee tournaments. Over time, it became my engineering lab. Every architecture decision, optimization, and scalability trade-off you'll find in this portfolio started as a problem I had to solve in production.

footer.bio: Backend engineer building and operating production systems.
footer.otherWorkNote: Earlier full-stack and infrastructure projects, kept for reference.

projects.title: Other Projects
projects.description: Earlier full-stack and infrastructure work. My current focus is backend engineering — see the UFT case study for that.
projects.emptyState: No projects available at the moment.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies
caseStudies.description: Engineering decisions from building UFT, explained the way I'd explain them in a design review: the problem, what I considered, what I chose, and why.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: I'm open to Senior Backend Engineering conversations.
